name: World Legacy in Shadow
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>星</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>せい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>遺</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>い</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>物</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ぶつ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>に<ruby lang="jp"><rb>差</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>さ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>す<ruby lang="jp"><rb>影</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>かげ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
name_jp_tl: Shadows Creeping on the Star Relic
desc: All "Krawler" monsters on the field gain 300 ATK/DEF. Once per turn: You can Special Summon 1 Level 2 or lower Insect monster from your hand in face-up or face-down Defense Position. When your Flip monster is destroyed by battle with an opponent's monster: You can send that opponent's monster to the GY.
eff: All "Krawler" monsters on the field gain 300 ATK/DEF. Once per turn: You can Special Summon 1 Level 2 or lower Insect monster from your hand in face-up or face-down Defense Position. When your Flip monster is destroyed by battle with an opponent's monster: You can send that opponent's monster to the GY.

action: Sends from your opponent's field to your opponent's Graveyard
